paragraphs: I have extensive experience with React. I understand and use all the Hooks and advanced design patterns. I have experience with Redux and Context API. I have experience with React Router and Next.js. I have experience with Material-UI and Ant Design. I have experience with Styled Components and CSS Modules.
I have experience working with and creating my own RESTful APIs. For example, creating a RESTful API with Node.js and Express.js to serve data to a React frontend.
